case_title: LAMBRECHT COMPANY, LLC VS DIVINE, CHRISTI M.

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED SENT TO DEFT.

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO ANDY KOUVERINIS:25 PACIFIC AVE.,SAN BRUNO,CA94021.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DIVINE, CHRISTI M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LAMBRECHT COMPANY, LLC DEFENDANT'S CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DENIED (BUT FOR THE $275.00 BELL PLUMBING CREDIT, WHICH IS COVERED ABOVE) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO LAMBRECHT CO./INGE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAMBRECHT COMPANY, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIVINE, CHRISTI M. $134.69 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $194.69, THIS JUDGMENT REFLECTS THE FOLLOWING: (1)PLAINTIFF KEEPS DEFTS SECURITY DEPOSIT + INTEREST.(2) DEFT GETS CREDIT OF $275 WHICH SHE PAID TO BELL PLUMBIN (3) THE DAMAGE TO THE PROPERTY CAUSED BY BELL PLUMBING WAS $1660. (4)$400 PAINTING FEE; $89.44 BOOKKEEPING DEBIT AND $120 MOVE-OUT FEE ALL VALID. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $6,494.00 FILED BY DIVINE, CHRISTI M. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LAMBRECHT COMPANY, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-19-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR POSTPONEMENT OF HRG. ORDER SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER. $10.00 FEE PAID.
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED SENT TO LAMBRECHT CO. LLC.
